---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Report a software defect or runtime issue to help us stabilize Synapse OS"
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

### Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Screenshots & Live Audit Log Output
If applicable, add browser screenshots, screenshot audit frames, or CLI container log errors to help us trace the failure.

### System Configuration
- **Browser/Agent:** [e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17]
- **Node.js Version:** [e.g. v20.11.0]
- **Platform/OS:** [e.g. macOS Sonoma, Linux Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Environment Context:** [e.g. Dev Server Local / Deployed Cloud Run Container]

### Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., missing environment variables, API token limits).
